title: Cluster Architecture — What's next
text:
Learn more about the following:
Nodes
and
their communication
with the control plane.
Kubernetes
controllers
.
Garbage collection
of cluster objects.
kube-scheduler
which is the default scheduler for Kubernetes.
Etcd's official
documentation
.
Several
container runtimes
in Kubernetes.
Integrating with cloud providers using
cloud-controller-manager
.
kubectl
commands.
